title: Amtech G0949 20cm (8 inch) Taping Knife, Stainless Steel, Wide Blade
features: IDEAL PRODUCT: This taping knife will be an indispensable part of any drywall job
WIDE BLADE: With a length of 20cm, the blade is suited to jobs of all sizes
NO RUST: The durable blade is made of stainless steel to prevent rusting
VERSATILE: This knife is perfect for spreading joint compound, smoothing, laying tape, and filling in holes
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
description: Product Description This 20cm (8 inch) taping knife is crucial to any drywall job. Perfect for spreading joint compound (or 'mud'), the wide 20cm x 8cm blade can also be used to smooth drywall, lay tape, and to fill in gaps. The blade of the tape knife is made of stainless steel to avoid rusting. Safety Warning No

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: spreading joint compound, smoothing drywall, laying tape, filling in holes
